articles.summary: AI isn't the future of customer support — it's the present:

MY THOUGHTS ON "FOUNDER MODE" AND WHY IT'S DANGEROUS
articles.summary: There is a tension between founder CEOs and product leaders, particularly when scaling a business. While 'founder mode' is valuable in the early stages, founders need to adapt, collaborate with experienced executives, and provide clear strategy as companies grow, rather than relying solely on innovation and early-stage tactics.

articles.title: WILL AI TAKE OVER HUMANS?
articles.summary: AI's evolution is reshaping social interactions and knowledge-based work, potentially displacing many jobs while leaving physical and emotional tasks untouched. Its dominance over knowledge work may free humanity to address critical global issues like environmental degradation, making it a tool for progress rather than a threat.

articles.title: MASTERING COMPETITIVE ANALYSIS: A PRODUCT MANAGER'S GUIDE TO OUTMANEUVERING THE MARKET
articles.summary: Competitive analysis is crucial for product managers. Make it ongoing, consider more than just features, and apply insights to your strategy. Use it to lead, not just follow, in your market.

articles.title: WHY IS EVERYONE HATING ON PRODUCT MANAGERS?
articles.summary: Focus on real customer feedback and execution, rather than obsessing over internal artifacts and unnecessary frameworks. Avoid falling for unsustainable trends like hypergrowth. Choose work carefully, avoid toxic leaders, and prioritize environments and incentives that foster genuine product development over optics and bureaucracy.

articles.title: EVERYTHING WRONG WITH THE PM JOB MARKET AND HOW TO FIX IT
articles.summary: The product management job market has shifted dramatically since 2022, with fewer open roles and intense competition for positions, leaving many qualified candidates struggling to even get their CVs seen. Meanwhile, employers face challenges of their own, including managing overwhelming volumes of applicants, mitigating hiring risks, and dealing with inefficiencies in recruitment processes, despite advanced tools like AI and ATS.

articles.title: 12 PROVEN SOURCES OF INSIGHTS TO FUEL YOUR PRODUCT DISCOVERY
articles.summary: Regular customer conversations are crucial, but true innovation stems from diverse insights. Here are 12 ways to enhance product discovery by tapping into various sources to thoroughly explore the problem space and maximize your impact as a PM.

articles.title: THE VERTICAL SAAS + PAYMENTS PLAYBOOK
articles.summary: Vertical software companies can significantly increase revenue and improve retention by integrating industry-specific payments solutions into their existing products, expanding their market size and customer engagement. By owning key workflows before and after transactions and leveraging third-party payment providers, these companies can scale quickly and monetize multiple revenue streams.

articles.title: MY FAVORITE UX RESEARCH BOOKS & WHY I LOVE THEM
DO YOU HAVE "THREE-PANE" RESILIENCE?
articles.summary: Throughout your career, you'll face intense external pressure. Build resilience by developing a strong outer layer to handle stress, using backup systems for support, and knowing when to deploy high-touch solutions.

articles.title: SHOULD WE DECOMPOSE OUR MONOLITH?
articles.summary: The debate between adopting microservices, monolithic architectures, or a hybrid has evolved, with many companies now reconsidering their earlier migrations to microservices due to the complexities and overhead involved. This post outlines Theoretical Compliance Company's service architecture strategy, emphasizing the importance of balancing business growth with infrastructure efficiency while navigating the challenges of partial migrations and differing team priorities.

articles.title: HOW TO SUCCEED IN MRBEAST PRODUCTION
articles.summary: A leaked onboarding document from MrBeast's production company reveals the unique culture and strategies behind creating viral YouTube content.

articles.title: 3 TOOLS TO MANAGE UP EASILY
articles.summary: Managing up is about aligning with your boss to create space for doing your best work with less oversight.
